Medallion Architecture · dbt 1.7 · Incremental MERGE · Multi-role RBAC · 2 warehouses
26-task DAG · Daily at 1:30 AM AEST (15:30 UTC)
Ingest → COPY INTO → Bronze → Silver → Gold → Reconcile → Notify
Snowflake: DB · 5 Schemas · 3 Roles · 2 Warehouses · 2 Users
Azure: Resource Group · ADLS Gen2 · Storage Account · Blob
Automated on every PR and push · dbt docs → GitHub Pages
Data Engineer · Azure · Snowflake · dbt · Airflow · Terraform
raw_payload VARIANT — full Stripe JSON preserved, schema-resilient
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() dedup guard in all Silver models
FX normalisation in Silver — all amounts → USD before Gold
Signed amount convention — refunds & disputes as negatives
Incremental MERGE strategy · Azure Blob remote state
Incremental watermark — only new records processed
dev · test · prod — 3 isolated Terraform environments
